name: @codegeneai/repo-scanner
description: Universal repository structure scanner for any codebase

scripts.build:single: bun run build:version && mkdir -p dist && bun build ./src/bin.ts --compile --bytecode --target=bun-linux-x64-baseline --outfile ./dist/repo-scanner
scripts.build:all: bun run build:version && mkdir -p dist && for target in bun-linux-x64 bun-linux-x64-baseline bun-linux-arm64 bun-darwin-x64 bun-darwin-x64-baseline bun-darwin-arm64 bun-windows-x64 bun-windows-x64-baseline; do bun build ./src/bin.ts --compile --bytecode --target=$target --outfile ./dist/repo-scanner-$target || exit 1; done
scripts.test:unit: files=$(find . -type f \( -name '*.unit.spec.ts' -o -name '*.unit.spec.tsx' -o -name '*.unit.test.ts' -o -name '*.unit.test.tsx' \)); if [ -n "$files" ]; then bun test $files; else echo 'No unit tests found'; fi
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist .turbo coverage .vitest build lib out tmp temp .cache node_modules tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
